summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Looking Glass network diagnostic tool. All backend APIs and frontend functionality working perfectly. Network tests (ping, traceroute, MTR, BGP), speed test, IP geolocation, and UI interactions all functional.
passed_tests: Get locations endpoint returns 4 server locations
Ping network test with simulated results
Traceroute network test with simulated results
MTR network test with simulated results
BGP lookup test with simulated results
IP geolocation lookup using ip-api.com service
Error handling for invalid IPs and locations
Frontend page loads with host9x.com branding
Location map displays 4 interactive location dots
Location selector dropdown with all 4 locations
Network test tabs (Ping, Traceroute, MTR, BGP) functional
Terminal window displays test results correctly
Server locations panel shows all 4 locations with selection
Test history panel displays recent tests
All UI panels visible and functional
